title: T-025 — Site permissions matrix UI 3 views + bulk CSV assign (MS-101)
prompt:
# T-025 — Site permissions matrix UI

PRD: docs/prd/14-MULTI-SITE-PRD.md §10B MS-101
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/admin-screens.jsx:4-138 (ms_permissions)
Bulk modal prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx:514-575 (permission_bulk_assign_modal)
Translation notes: _meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-multi-site.md §ms_permissions, §M-09

## Goal
Admin-only page with 3 view tabs (Matrix / Per-User / Per-Site) over site_user_access + bulk CSV import (User Email, Site Code, Role) reusing the 4-step CsvImportWizard pattern from T-016.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(multi-site)/permissions/page.tsx (RSC) — fetches users + sites + site_user_access joined; renders shadcn Tabs with 3 views.
2. Matrix view: sticky-first-col CSS user×site grid with click-on-empty-cell → AssignUserModal. Super_admin rows show 'ALL' badge in all site columns.
3. Per-User view: TanStack Table flat list with edit/remove row actions.
4. Per-Site view: shadcn Accordion per site.
5. Bulk CSV: shadcn Tabs (Single / Bulk) in dialog; Bulk = 4-step CsvImportWizard (extracted shared from T-016).
6. Server Action bulkAssignUsersFromCSV: parse + validate emails-exist + site codes valid + roles valid; report errors per row pre-apply; tx-batch apply.
7. Server Action assignUser({userId, siteId, role, isPrimary}) — V-MS-06 if isPrimary=true unset any prior primary for same user.
8. Tests: matrix click-to-assign opens modal, bulk CSV validation per-row errors, V-MS-06 primary uniqueness enforcement, super_admin ALL badge rendering, admin-only gate.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/permissions/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/permissions/_components/permissions-matrix-view.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/permissions/_components/permissions-per-user-view.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/permissions/_components/permissions-per-site-view.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/permissions/_components/permission-bulk-assign-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/permissions/_actions/assign-user.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/permissions/_actions/bulk-assign-users-from-csv.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/permissions/_components/__tests__/permissions-matrix-view.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(multi-site)/permissions/_components/__tests__/permission-bulk-assign-modal.test.tsx [create]
- packages/ui/src/csv-import-wizard.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/admin-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- AC count consolidated from 9→4 by Fixer F14a 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost) -->
1. Given the page renders, when compared to admin-screens.jsx:4-138 (ms_permissions), then 3 view tabs match (Matrix sticky first col, Per-User flat, Per-Site accordion) — RTL parity + Playwright trace.
2. Given super_admin user rows, when Matrix view renders, then all site columns show 'ALL' badge instead of per-site role badge.
3. Given empty cell at (user_U, site_X), when clicked, then AssignUserModal opens pre-populated with user_U + site_X.
4. Given assignUser({isPrimary:true}) for user with existing primary at site_Y, when settles, then site_Y row.is_primary=false and new row.is_primary=true (V-MS-06).
5. Given bulkAssignUsersFromCSV invoked with a CSV where row 3 has invalid email, when previewing, then row 3 shows error 'email does not exist' and apply is blocked until either fix or row 3 is skipped.
6. Given valid bulk CSV applied, when tx settles, then all valid rows inserted, audit_events 'bulk_site_access_assigned' row written with summary {succeeded, failed, errors}.
7. Given user role != admin, when GET /multi-site/permissions, then 403.
8. Given accessibility audit runs (axe), when Matrix is in the DOM, then zero violations (sticky col + role grid roles set correctly).

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity + ALL badge + click-to-assign + V-MS-06 + bulk CSV per-row validation + admin gate + a11y before components exist.
- Run 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run permissions-matrix-view' + 'pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run permission-bulk-assign-modal' + Playwright permissions.spec.ts.

## Prototype parity
Reference prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/admin-screens.jsx:4-138 (ms_permissions) and prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/multi-site/modals.jsx:514-575 (permission_bulk_assign_modal).
Implement matching the canonical layout 1:1 per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`. Capture RTL parity snapshot + Playwright trace as closeout evidence.

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale.
- Do not implement primary uniqueness in JS — relies on partial unique index from T-003 + Server Action unset-previous logic.
- Do not commit bulk CSV partially — single tx (if any row fails post-validation, roll back the batch).
- Do not let non-admin reach page (Server-side guard).
- Do not omit super_admin ALL badge — V-MS-07 visibility.
- Do not skip CodeOwners review for CSV wizard primitive — packages/ui change.

Given empty cell at (user_U, site_X), when clicked, then AssignUserModal opens pre-populated; AND given assignUser({isPrimary:true}) for user with existing primary at site_Y when settles then site_Y is_primary=false.

Given bulkAssignUsersFromCSV invoked with CSV row 3 invalid email, when previewing, then row 3 shows error 'email does not exist' and apply blocked; AND given valid bulk CSV applied when tx settles then all valid rows inserted + audit_events 'bulk_site_user_assignment' recorded.
Given user role != admin, when GET /multi-site/permissions, then 403; AND given axe runs when Matrix in DOM then zero violations.

For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
